notes: Solid, well-structured Pong implementation with proper ball physics, angle-based paddle bouncing, speed acceleration, AI tracking, audio, and win condition — minor nitpick is the SERVE state feels slightly redundant but overall nearly flawless.
An absolutely flawless implementation of Pong with perfect state management, fair AI, scaling, and audio.

A solid and mostly complete Pong build with responsive controls and accurate presentation, but it loses points for simplistic AI, immediate start bypassing the serve screen, and minor polish/flow issues.
